summary: Tested P1 (mobile responsiveness) and P2 (pricing rules CRUD UI). All 12 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed. P2 pricing rules fully working with toggle, edit, delete. P1 mobile nav text not truncated, bookings use card layout on mobile.

issues: ESLint warning: useEffect has missing dependency 'loadData' (line 135) - not critical but should be fixed with useCallback

passed_tests: PUT /api/pricing-rules/{rule_id} - Updates rule name, priority, action
DELETE /api/pricing-rules/{rule_id} - Deletes rule and removes from list
GET /api/venues/{venue_id}/slots - Applies pricing rules to slot prices
frontend_tests_passed: P2: Venue owner pricing rules tab shows 4 seeded rules
P2: Create rule dialog opens with all fields (name, priority, days, time range, action type, value)
P2: Live price preview shows correct calculation (₹2000 → ₹2400 for 1.2x multiplier)
P2: Day-of-week selection buttons work (Sun-Sat toggle)
P2: Edit pencil icon opens dialog with existing rule data
P2: Delete trash icon removes rule from list
P1: Mobile bottom navbar (375px) shows text labels without truncation
P1: Player mobile nav: Dashboard, Venues, Matches, Ranks, Alerts, Profile all visible
P1: Venue owner mobile nav: Dashboard, Alerts, Profile visible
P1: VenueOwnerDashboard bookings tab uses card layout (not table)
P1: Booking cards show venue name, guest, date, time, status badge, price
P1: Pricing rules work on mobile with card layout
Player booking flow regression: Venue detail loads with 34 slots
Pricing rules applied to slot prices (₹1700 early bird, ₹2200 peak)
critical_code_review_comments: VenueOwnerDashboard.js line 135: useEffect missing loadData dependency - wrap loadData in useCallback to fix
Dialog accessibility warning: Missing Description for DialogContent - add aria-describedby or DialogDescription
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed pricing rules during testing, cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: P1 mobile responsiveness and P2 pricing rules CRUD fully working. Pricing rules API endpoints: GET/POST /venues/{id}/pricing-rules, PUT/PUT-toggle/DELETE /pricing-rules/{id}. PowerPlay Arena has 4 pricing rules: Weekend Peak Updated (1.3x), Weekend Surge (1.2x), Peak Hours (1.1x), Early Bird Discount (0.85x). Mobile nav uses w-14 (56px) buttons with text-[9px] labels. Bookings tab uses glass-card layout.

mocked_apis.Razorpay payment processing: MOCKED - falls back to mock mode when no gateway keys configured

pricing_rules_get.details: GET /api/venues/{venue_id}/pricing-rules returns list with id, name, priority, conditions, action, is_active

pricing_rules_create.details: POST creates rule with discount or multiplier action type

pricing_rules_ui.details: Full UI with cards, toggle switch, edit/delete buttons, live preview

mobile_bookings_cards.details: VenueOwnerDashboard bookings tab uses glass-card layout, not table

player_booking_flow.details: Venue detail shows slots with pricing rules applied
